description_long: This is a modern military attack helicopter with a streamlined, angular fuselage and a tandem cockpit configuration. The helicopter features a prominent main rotor with four long, straight blades and a tail rotor mounted on the vertical stabilizer. Its exterior is finished in a matte dark gray, with visible weapon pylons and missile pods attached to both sides of the fuselage. The cockpit windows are sharply angled and tinted, providing a narrow, armored appearance. The landing gear consists of robust, short skids designed for stability on rough terrain. No visible registration numbers or civilian markings are present, emphasizing its military role.
description: A dark gray, modern military attack helicopter with four-blade main and tail rotors, angular tinted cockpit windows, and weapon pylons on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, armored cockpit, four-blade main rotor, and symmetrical weapon pylons with missile pods.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, tandem cockpit, and the full length of the main and tail rotors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the landing skids and weapon pylons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other profile of the fuselage, cockpit, and weapon mounts.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with no visible markings, each blade approximately 6-7 meters in length.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor present on the vertical stabilizer, appears to have four short blades in a cross configuration, colored black, with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Short, robust landing skids made of metal, colored dark gray, with visible crossbars for structural support and stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple sharply angled cockpit windows, likely four to six, arranged in a tandem configuration, tinted dark, with thick framing and no visible markings.
